articles.title: Ethereum’s Verge roadmap could enable ‘stateless clients’ for block verification on everyday devices
articles.description: Buterin says fully-verifying clients and staking nodes should not need to have more than a few gigabytes of storage.

articles.title: AI Bot Turns $50K into Millions with Meme Coin Surge
articles.description: An AI bot funded by a $50K Bitcoin grant helped launch a meme coin, GOAT, which skyrocketed to a $300M market cap in just four days.
